refined_caption: Trash bins outside the hospital building are overflowing, with waste visible next to a wall. The bins appear to be full and not recently emptied.
complaint_description: I was appalled to see the trash bins outside the hospital building overflowing with garbage. This is not only an eyesore, but it also creates an unsanitary environment for patients and visitors. The hospital should ensure that the trash is regularly collected and disposed of properly.
voice_text: The trash cans outside the hospital are totally overflowing, it's really gross and unsanitary.
